title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Failure Case: Workflow Security
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates workflow security increment in a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin and minimize CI actions, tokens, permissions, and untrusted-code exposure.
Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
